title: phyllorkis uniflora
intro: Phyllorkis uniflora, also known as the "one-flowered orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyllorkis uniflora are said to include aiding in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
